name: Marshmallows/9th Grade Home EC Class
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Plain gelatin (soak in 1/2 cup cold water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and 3/4 cup water in a heavy-bottomed pan. Cook to soft ball stage, 238 degrees.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the gelatin mixture.
3. Pour into a glass mixing bowl. Cool slightly and then whip until thick and white. Add vanilla flavoring.
4. Mix together 2 tablespoons powdered sugar and 2 tablespoons cornstarch. Spread into a 9-inch square pan. Pour candy into prepared pan, let stand.
5. Cut into squares using a wet knife and dust with powdered sugar.
Please add this to the marshmallow recipe to keep the marshmallows from being grainy. When you start cooking the sugar and water, be sure to dissolve the sugar crystals before it begins boiling as is done with fudge. Either wipe down the sides of pan with a watered brush or cover pan for a few minutes.
